summary: The FINGER technique records seven out of ten fingertips but excludes either a single index/middle combination due to their importance; thus, it typically omits both thumbs from being imaged as an alternative approach focusing more broadly without compromising functionality significantly by leaving off two less crucial digits instead of four highly functional ones such as all toes
